session_log.summary: Expanded validation at T1 tier boundary: 62/63 tests verified passing. 1 regression: #12 (MCP server not running — WebSocket transport bug confirmed). Code integrity audit clean.

Fixed MCP WebSocket transport (Starlette ASGI + uvicorn). Fixed EditorGroups scroll layout (h-full + min-h-0). Fixed RunHeader stage count (visibleStages). Verified 14 tests via Puppeteer pipeline runs. T0 complete, T2 started: 13/106.

Wired StatusBar to display overall score and strategy name after forge completion. Test #168 now passing. 3 remaining gaps need coding agent (orphan Toast/RepoPickerModal, unused /api/optimizations endpoints). Also committed session 9's uncommitted PromptEdit.svelte SSE duration improvements.

Expanded validation: all 77 passing tests verified across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Code integrity audit clean. Full pipeline e2e confirmed (4/4 stages, score 9/10, RISEN). StatusBar lifecycle (#168) verified. Build clean.

No new integration gaps found from latest coding session (token counts, run header, streaming, auto-switch). All recently-built components properly wired: token count flow (backend→SSE→forge→StageCard/RunHeader), streaming text (chunks→forge→StageOptimize/ForgeArtifact), auto-switch (PromptEdit→editor.setSubTab), total duration/tokens (complete event→finishForge→RunHeader). 3 previously-known gaps (Toast, RepoPickerModal, /api/optimizations) remain flagged for coding agent.

server_state.notes: Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP server RUNNING (WebSocket transport fixed in session 9). DB at backend/data/promptforge.db with 3 tables. All services verified healthy. T0: 18/18 complete, T1: 45/45 complete, T2: 20/106 in progress. 83/335 tests passing (24.8%). Full pipeline e2e confirmed working.
